docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,350.00 FILED BY BRANCO, ETHEL AS TO DEFENDANT BODEN, EDWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BODEN, EDWARD

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-23-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-28-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL. POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BODEN, EDWARD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRANCO, ETHEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BODEN, EDWARD $1,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,402.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
